title: campanula × fergusonii
intro: Campanula × fergusonii, also known as Ferguson's bellflower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Campanula × fergusonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and relieve various ailments.
